primary_text:
If your pet sees the vet twice a year, those two consults alone cost $260 to $300. Add vaccinations, dental, parasite prevention, and you are over $800.

Or: $50/month with Best for Pet. Unlimited consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 VetChat.

Members save $800 to $1,300 a year.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: Two vet visits. Already over $800/yr.
description: Save $800+/yr. $50/month for unlimited consults, vaccinations, dental. Cancel anytime.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Before/after split. Left: receipt growing. Right: $50/month flat line. Clean, impactful.
